item.title:
JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 3h Jordan Spieth through 36 holes this week: *1-under-par *0 bogeys *4 double bogeys
He is
item.description:
Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 3h Jordan Spieth through 36 holes this week: *1-under-par *0 bogeys *4 double bogeys
He is the only player over the last 20 years on the PGA Tour to be under par, have 4+ doubles and 0 bogeys through 36 holes in any tournament. 15 44 807 55 mil

Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 3h En respuesta a @JustinRayGolf Thank you to follower @StefanScrafield for bringing this to my attention
I stopped digging at 20 years because I have a family 54 7 mil

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 3h Hogan at Merion. Nicklaus at Baltusrol. DeChambeau at Chapultepec. Cita LIV Golf @li
JosephLaMagna: Joseph LaMagna @JosephLaMagna · 4h We cannot lose Lost Marsh, one of the greatest Design Disasters in the world Cita PFT
item.description: Joseph LaMagna @JosephLaMagna · 4h We cannot lose Lost Marsh, one of the greatest Design Disasters in the world Cita PFT Commenter @PFTCommenter · 7h I can report that a couple hours ago I saw the bears ownership and Kevin Warren at lost marsh golf club in Hammond Indiana conducting some sort of important business meeting with security and suits and every thing. The golf course is directly adjacent to the proposed Indiana 18 19 1 mil 245 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 5h #DISCUSSION — Which club in your golf bag goes 150 yards? 640 78 376 229 mil
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 5h #DISCUSSION — Which club in your golf bag goes 150 yards? 640 78 376 229 mil
